author: Jorge Asenjo
name: SP8192 Multi-Phase Global SGD + Phased TTT
blurb: Multi-phase global SGD at test time: score chunks, apply SGD to base weights, repeat for 3 phases. SP-8192 tokenizer, int7 embeddings, per-layer GPTQ with sigma clipping, Muon optimizer, depth recurrence, VarLen attention, fused MLP. 3-seed mean val_bpb 1.07219.
